title: Parameter Golf Submission - Efficient 21K Parameter Language Model
author: Vinaya-ai
body:
This submission presents a highly parameter-efficient language model designed under strict constraints.

Key highlights:
- Reduced vocabulary size to 200 for dense learning signal
- Compact architecture (Embedding=16, Hidden=64)
- ~21K parameters total
- Optimized training strategy (lr=0.005, 30 epochs)

Approach focused on maximizing performance per parameter rather than absolute model size.

All components included:
- Model weights
- Config
- Training log
- Execution script
- Tokenizer files

The model is fully reproducible by running:
python final_model.py
